author: Sebastien Delisle
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Quickly add a list of formatted dates.

manifest.author: Sebastien
manifest.description: Returns a list of dates according to the conditions you supply.
manifest.name: Date List

name: Date List

releases.author: lumargh
releases.description: - Fix `@` and `@@` triggers not firing when not the first character of the line

releases.author: lumargh
releases.description:
**Redesigned \`@\` date autosuggest**

The \`@\` trigger now uses a phased predictive matching system:

- \`@\` — shows today, tomorrow, yesterday
- Letter prefix — filters presets and upcoming weekdays (\`@mo\` → next 7 Mondays)
- Month prefix — \`@jun\` → next 7 days from June; \`@jun 15\` → anchored to Jun 15
- \`@this\` / \`@next\` / \`@last\` — expands to days of the relevant week
- Numeric entry — ISO \`@2026-06-15\`, compact \`@20260615\`, slash \`@6/15\` (US/EU labeled), military \`@15 jun 2026\`
- Date math — \`@+7\` (all units), \`@+7d\` / \`@+7 days\`; \`@+\` and \`@-\` default to tomorrow / yesterday

**New \`@@\` date list autosuggest**

Type \`@@\` to insert a formatted list of dates at the cursor. Six range presets appear immediately (this week, next week, this month, next month, next 7 days, next 30 days), or type \`@@next 3 weeks\` for custom date math. Both the \`@\` and \`@@\` triggers are configurable in settings.

**Quick Insert redesign**

The Quick Insert command now opens a live search input — type any date expression and the list updates instantly, matching the \`@\` autosuggest experience.

**Other improvements**

- Tab key accepts the selected autosuggest suggestion
- Fixed autosuggest closing after typing one character in production
- Updated popup instructions: \`type\` · \`↵ ⇥\` · \`↑↓\`
- All OK buttons are now styled as primary actions

releases.author: lumargh
releases.description:
# Calendar Date Picker
The calendar icon on date input fields now opens a popup calendar. Click the icon to pick a date visually; selecting a date fills the field automatically.

## Inline Date Autocomplete — Presets
Typing the trigger character (default @) now shows a list of common date presets (today, tomorrow, yesterday, next Monday, next week, next month) that you can arrow through or click. Keep typing any date expression to filter or override.

## Configurable Autocomplete Trigger
The @ trigger can now be changed in Settings → Date List → Inline date trigger. Note: avoid / if Obsidian's Slash Commands plugin is enabled.

## Insert Date List — Single Screen
The Insert Date List command no longer opens a second screen for custom ranges. Option 7 (Custom) expands inline with four range methods:

- Between — specific start and end date
- In the next — N days/weeks/months/years from today
- In the past — N days/weeks/months/years back to today
- Duration — N days/weeks/months/years from a chosen start date
## Configure Format Button
A ⚙ Configure format… button now appears at the bottom of every command screen, letting you adjust format, wiki links, prefix, and postfix without leaving your current flow.

## OK Button
Every modal screen now has a small OK button for mouse users who prefer not to press Enter or use keyboard navigation.
releases.name: Date List 1.1.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Live preview sidebar
Every step of the wizard now shows a real-time preview of your date list on the right side of the modal. Hover over an option to see how it affects the output before committing.

## Wiki link aliases
When wiki links are enabled, you can now add a display alias to each link — e.g. [[2026-01-15|Thu, Jan 15]]. Choose from presets or enter a custom Moment.js format.

## Postfix support
New step to optionally append text after each date (-, —, or custom).

## Settings persistence
All wizard choices are remembered after each insert and pre-fill the next time you run the command. Every default is also configurable directly in Settings → Date List.

## Expanded natural language date input
The start date field now accepts a wider range of inputs: june 1, Jun 1st, 6/1, june 1, 2027, and more — in addition to the existing today, +7, next monday, and ISO format.

## Preview improvements
The preview panel shows the first 3 dates, a collapsed ⋮ (N hidden) line, the last date, and the total count — giving a clear picture of the full list without showing every entry.

## Bug fixes
Fixed keyboard navigation on picker screens, Enter key advancing through prompts, and popout window compatibility.
releases.name: Date List 1.0.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Date List inserts a formatted list of dates at your cursor through a step-by-step wizard.

## Features

- Natural language date input (today, next monday, june 1, +7, etc.)
- Span by days, weeks, or months
- Format presets (your default, ISO, short) or a custom Moment.js string
- Optional [[wiki link]] wrapping
- Optional line prefix (-, - [ ], or custom)
- Full keyboard navigation — arrow keys, number shortcuts, Escape to go back
releases.name: Date List 1.0.0
